cards.title: Patient Counselling Skills
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Motivational Interviewing: OARS (Open, Affirm, Reflect, Summarise)
  • Stages of Change (Prochaska): Pre-contemplation → Maintenance
  • SMART goal setting with patients
  • Habit stacking & implementation intentions
  • Compliance strategies in chronic disease
